cause_of_action: OTHER CIVIL PETITIONS (PETITION FOR LEAVE TO FILE ACTION AGAINST GOVERNMENTAL ENTITY)

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION FOR LEAVE TO FILE ACTION AGAINST GOVERNMENTAL ENTITY FILED BY PETITIONER WALLS, EDWARD C.
REPLY TO RESPONDENT'S OPPOS TO PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER WALLS, EDWARD C.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER EDWARD WALLS' HEARING ON PETITION FOR LEAVE TO FILE ACTION AGAINST GOVERNMENTAL ENTITY IS GRANTED. PETITIONER DEMONSTRATES EXCUSABLE NEGLECT AND GRANTING THE RELIEF DOES NOT PREJUDICE RESPONDENT BECAUSE OTHERS HAVE FILED SUIT AGAINST RESPONDENT BASED ON THE SAME ACCIDENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Leave File Action Against Governmental Entity
Off Calendar Dec-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Karen M. Platt, Esq., 650.851.8880, for petitioner Edward C. Walls; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER EDWARD WALLS' Hearing On Petition For Leave To File Action Against Governmental Entity is granted. Petitioner demonstrates excusable neglect and granting the relief does not prejudice Respondent because others have filed suit against Respondent based on the same accident. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Leave File Action Against Governmental Entity
Off Calendar Nov-16-2012 Continued To Dec-13-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
